{% load i18n %} {% load static %}

{% trans "What's MetaTrader 4?" %}

{% trans 'MetaTrader 4 is a widely used trading platform that offers a robust trading environment for both beginners and experienced traders. It provides:' %}

  • {% trans 'Advanced charting and analysis tools' %}
  • {% trans 'Automated trading capabilities' %}
  • {% trans 'Secure and reliable execution' %}
  • {% trans 'Extensive broker support' %}

{% trans 'What can you trade with MetaTrader 4?' %}

{% trans 'With MetaTrader 4, you can trade a wide range of financial instruments depending on your broker, including:' %}

  • {% trans 'Forex' %}:{% trans 'Major, minor, and exotic currency pairs.' %}
  • {% trans 'Commodities' %}:{% trans 'Gold, silver, oil, and other commodities.' %}
  • {% trans 'Indices' %}:{% trans 'Popular stock market indices such as S&P 500, NASDAQ, DAX, and more.' %}
  • {% trans 'Cryptocurrencies' %}:{% trans 'Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other cryptocurrencies (availability depends on broker).' %}
  • {% trans 'CFDs' %}:{% trans 'Contracts for Difference for various markets offered by your broker.' %}

{% trans 'Note: The availability of instruments may vary depending on your chosen broker and account type (demo or live).' %}

{% trans 'MetaTrader 4 login details' %}

{% trans 'Follow the steps below to get your MetaTrader 4 login details.' %}

1 {% trans 'Create a MetaTrader 4 Account' %}

  1. {% trans "If you don't already have a MetaTrader 4 account, visit one of the following brokers:" %}
    • ICMarkets
    • RoboForex
  2. {% trans 'Create an account or log in if you already have one.' %}
  3. {% trans 'Select a trading account type that suits your trading needs.' %}

2 {% trans 'Access Your MetaTrader 4 Credentials' %}

{% trans 'After signing up with your chosen broker:' %}

  1. {% trans 'Check your email for your MetaTrader 4 login credentials.' %}
  2. {% trans "Save these credentials securely - you'll need them for platform integration." %}
{% include 'include/warnings.html' with warning='Never share your login details with anyone. We use industry-standard encryption to secure your credentials.' %}

{% trans 'Complete Integration' %}

{% trans "Once you have your MetaTrader 4 login credentials, return to our platform's Automate section to link your account. This will enable automated trading based on your TradingView alerts." %}
